labels.zh-CN: 数值方法 · 主成分分析
labels.en: Numerical methods · principal component analysis

labels.zh-CN: 8 个房屋特征，可以压缩成几个方向？
labels.en: How many directions can summarize eight housing features?

labels.zh-CN: Ames 本地数值快照 · 2,927 行
labels.en: Local Ames numeric snapshot · 2,927 rows

labels.zh-CN: 8 个连续或有序数值特征
labels.en: Eight continuous or ordinal numeric features

labels.zh-CN: 不使用房价标签
labels.en: Sale-price labels are not used

labels.zh-CN: 先让不同单位的特征站在同一尺度上
labels.en: First put differently scaled features on a common scale

labels.zh-CN: 原始列
labels.en: Raw columns

labels.zh-CN: 面积：平方英尺
labels.en: Area: square feet
Quality: 1–10 score

labels.zh-CN: 房龄：年
labels.en: House age: years

labels.zh-CN: 量纲不同，方差不能直接比较
labels.en: Variance is not directly comparable across different units

labels.zh-CN: 标准化矩阵 Z
labels.en: Standardized matrix Z

labels.zh-CN: 使用总体标准差 ddof = 0
labels.en: Use population standard deviation with ddof zero

labels.zh-CN: PCA 旋转坐标轴，让第一轴捕捉最大方差
labels.en: PCA rotates the axes so the first captures maximum variance

labels.zh-CN: PC1：最大方差方向
labels.en: PC1: maximum-variance direction

labels.zh-CN: PC2：与 PC1 正交
labels.en: PC2: orthogonal to PC1

labels.zh-CN: 二维点云仅解释方向；真实计算使用 8 维数据
labels.en: The 2D cloud explains direction only; the calculation uses eight dimensions

labels.zh-CN: vⱼ 互相正交，长度为 1
labels.en: The v_j vectors are orthogonal unit vectors

labels.zh-CN: 协方差特征分解与 SVD 给出同一组主方向
labels.en: Covariance eigendecomposition and SVD give the same principal directions

labels.zh-CN: 协方差路线
labels.en: Covariance route

labels.zh-CN: 列 vⱼ 是主方向
labels.en: Columns v_j are principal directions

labels.zh-CN: SVD 路线
labels.en: SVD route

labels.zh-CN: 右奇异向量仍是 vⱼ
labels.en: Right singular vectors are still v_j

labels.zh-CN: 同一谱
labels.en: The same spectrum

labels.zh-CN: 本例两种路线的解释方差比最大差 1.332 × 10⁻¹⁵
labels.en: The maximum explained-ratio difference between routes is 1.332 × 10⁻¹⁵

labels.zh-CN: 累计解释方差决定保留多少维
labels.en: Cumulative explained variance determines how many dimensions to retain
First two dimensions: 71.73%
First four dimensions: 92.15%

labels.zh-CN: 阈值规则：累计比例 ≥ 90%
labels.en: Threshold rule: cumulative ratio at least 90%

labels.zh-CN: 压缩后再还原：用重构误差衡量丢失的信息
labels.en: Reconstruct after compression to measure lost information

labels.zh-CN: 投影到 k 个主成分
labels.en: Project onto k principal components

labels.zh-CN: 回到 8 维标准化特征空间
labels.en: Return to the eight-dimensional standardized feature space

labels.zh-CN: 标准化单位下的 RMSE
labels.en: RMSE in standardized units

labels.zh-CN: 保留更多方向，重构误差下降
labels.en: Retaining more directions lowers reconstruction error

labels.zh-CN: PCA 保留输入特征的主要变化方向
labels.en: PCA retains major variation directions in the input features

labels.zh-CN: 它不看房价标签，也不自动保证预测更好
labels.en: It does not inspect sale-price labels or guarantee better prediction

labels.zh-CN: 标准化规则、阈值和业务解释必须写清楚
labels.en: Scaling, thresholds, and domain interpretation must be explicit

labels.zh-CN: 本例选择 k = 4，因为累计解释方差首次达到 90%
labels.en: This example selects k=4 because cumulative explained variance first reaches 90%
